message:
deps(Cargo.lock): refresh transitive dependency patch versions (rand 0.10.0→0.10.1, bitflags 2.11.0→2.11.1)

Lock-file-only refresh picked up from a clean `cargo build` after the
preceding `Cargo.toml` patch-table cleanup (ee8d00f). The top-level
dependency declarations are unchanged; this just records the new
transitive patch versions that cargo resolved once the local-path
`[patch.crates-io]` entries were removed and the real crates.io
versions took over.

Patch-version bumps:

  * rand 0.10.0 → 0.10.1
  * bitflags 2.11.0 → 2.11.1

Both are semver-patch releases. No direct call-site changes needed.

Committing the refreshed lockfile so CI and `cargo install --locked`
users get a deterministic resolution, and so the next fresh `cargo
build` does not re-dirty the working tree with the same two lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
